subject: Deerling, a small fawn-like Pokemon with a flower blossom on its head, standing in a snow-dusted winter forest
description: A small deer-like creature with a pink blossom arrangement on its head stands in a winter forest scene. The body is pale tan-cream, with delicate leg proportions reminiscent of a fawn. The head bears a flower-blossom form consistent with a seasonal form marker. The surrounding environment shows snow-dusted ground, bare-limbed trees, and a cool blue-white winter light. The creature's expression is gentle and calm, gazing slightly to one side. The scene is quiet and still — a winter pastoral. The seasonal nature of the Pokemon (changing with the seasons) aligns visually with the winter snow environment.
foreground: Deerling standing in snow, tan body with flower on head
background: snow-dusted winter forest, bare trees, cool blue-white light
